summary: High-Performance System Architect with 3.5+ years of experience building scalable, high-throughput backend ecosystems. Expert in Spring Boot microservices, Redis-driven performance optimization (40% latency reduction), and geohash engineering for 1M+ active devices. Currently architecting secure banking solutions at Infosys with a focus on systemic efficiency and low-latency financial architecture.

experience.title: High-Performance System Architect
responsibilities: Spearheading core Banking microservices development using Java 8+ and Spring Boot, focusing on transaction atomicity, multi-threading, and secure financial processing.
Architecting high-throughput RESTful APIs designed for financial data integrity and sub-second response times in high-concurrency environments.
Collaborating in an Agile squad to modernize legacy payment systems, utilizing JFrog Artifactory for secure binary management and Splunk for real-time monitoring and log analytics.
Utilizing AI-augmented coding tools (GitHub Copilot) to streamline unit testing and achieve 80%+ code coverage.

experience.title: Software Developer
responsibilities: Optimized distributed microservices, achieving a 35% reduction in API latency through strategic Redis caching, SQL indexing, and query re-engineering.
Architected a unified audience management service integrating Meta, Snapchat, and TikTok marketing APIs, processing millions of daily data points.
Modernized legacy monolithic systems by re-architecting critical APIs into microservices, improving system scalability and user experience metrics by 20%.
Developed a specialized proximity hash algorithm in Java, significantly increasing location-targeting accuracy for geospatial marketing campaigns.
Built high-performance dashboards with Next.js and React, improving Core Web Vitals and load times by 25%.
Established automated code quality gates using SonarQube, identifying and resolving 100+ critical vulnerabilities pre-production.

education.degree: Master of Science (M.Sc) in Computer Science
Bachelor of Science (B.Sc) in Computer Science

achievements: Second Prize in National College Debugging Competition at Trichy.
